exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your grandparent role forward
items: Schedule weekly one-on-one bonding time with each grandchild to discover their unique interests and build individual relationships
Schedule a monthly physical activity session with your grandchildren such as walking, swimming, or playground activities to maintain your health while building active bonding experiences together
Create a grandparent memory box or scrapbook with photos, letters, and mementos to share your family history with your grandchildren
Schedule a monthly physical activity session with your grandchildren such as walking, swimming, or playground activities to maintain your health while building active bonding experiences together
Write a letter to your future self as a grandparent, outlining the type of grandparent you want to be and the relationship you hope to build with your grandchildren
Schedule a monthly physical activity session with your grandchildren such as walking, swimming, or playground activities to maintain your health while building active bonding experiences together
